title: System, method, and apparatus for building and rendering a message user interface in a group-based communication system
abstract: Embodiments of the present disclosure provide methods, systems, apparatuses, and computer program products for building an rendering a message user interface (UI) within a group-based communication interface of a group-based communication system, where the message UI is rendered to a client device based on a customizable block configuration and on customizable block data that is received from an external application.
claims: Claims CLAIMS: 1. An apparatus for building and rendering a message user interface (UI) within a group-based communication interface of a group-based communication system, the apparatus comprising at least one processor and at least one memory including computer program code, the at least one memory and the computer program code configured to, with the at least one processor, cause the apparatus to: receive, from an external application, user message data associated with the group-based communication interface to be rendered to a client device; parse the user message data to identify a message UI triggering event, wherein the message UI triggering event is associated with the client device; in circumstances where the message UI triggering event is identified among the user message data, determine, based on the message UI triggering event, a customizable block configuration to define the message UI that is rendered within the group-based communication interface, transmit a customizable block request to the external application associated with the customizable block configuration, receive customizable block data from the external application associated with the customizable block request, and render the message UI within the group-based communication interface based on the customizable block configuration and on the customizable block data. 2. The apparatus of Claim 1, wherein the customizable block configuration comprises a plurality of blocks, each block comprising a plurality of elements. 3. The apparatus of Claim 2, wherein the customizable block request comprises a plurality of block types, each block type associated with a respective block within the customizable block configuration. 4. The apparatus of Claim 3, wherein the customizable block data received from the external application comprises a plurality of block arrays, each block array associated with a respective block type and comprising a plurality of element values, wherein each element value is associated with an element attribute. 5. The apparatus of Claim 4, the at least one memory and the computer program code further configured to, with the at least one processor, cause the apparatus to: render the message UI within the group-based communication interface based on the customizable block configuration and the plurality of block arrays. 6. The apparatus of Claim 3, wherein the block type is a text block type, a thumbnail block type, a divider block type, an image block type, a video block type, a meta block type, an action block type, a poll block type, a file block type, or a call block type. 7. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the text block type is associated with a text element. 8. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the thumbnail block type is associated with an image element. 9. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the divider block type is associated with a divider element. 10. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the image block type is associated with an image element or a text element. 11. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the video block type is associated with a video element. 12. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the meta block type is associated with an image element or a text element. 13. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the action block type is associated with a button element, a dropdown menu element, or an overflow menu element. 14. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the poll block type is associated with an image element or a text element. 15. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the file block type is associated with an image element or a text element. 16. The apparatus of Claim 6, wherein the call block type is associated with a button element. 17. The apparatus of Claim 13, wherein each of the button element, the dropdown menu element, or the overflow menu element is associated with a plurality of action element attributes comprising a color attribute or an action text attribute. 18. The apparatus of Claim 16, wherein the button element is associated with a plurality of action element attributes comprising a color attribute or an action text attribute. 19. The apparatus of Claim 8, wherein the image element is associated with a plurality of image element attributes comprising a size attribute. 20. The apparatus of Claim 10, wherein the image element is associated with a plurality of image element attributes comprising a size attribute. 21. The apparatus of Claim 12, wherein the image element is associated with a plurality of image element attributes comprising a size attribute. 22. The apparatus of Claim 14, wherein the image element is associated with a plurality of image element attributes comprising a size attribute. 23. The apparatus of Claim 15, wherein the image element is associated with a plurality of image element attributes comprising a size attribute. 24. A method for building and rendering a message user interface (UI) within a group-based communication interface of a group-based communication system, the method comprising: Receiving, from an external application, user message data associated with the group- based communication interface to be rendered to a client device; parsing the user message data to identify a message UI triggering event, wherein the message UI triggering event is associated with the client device; in circumstances where the message UI triggering event is identified among the user message data, determining, based on the message UI triggering event, a customizable block configuration to define the message UI that is rendered within the group-based communication interface, transmitting a customizable block request to the external application associated with the customizable block configuration, receiving customizable block data from the external application associated with the customizable block request, and rendering the message UI within the group-based communication interface based on the customizable block configuration and on the customizable block data. 25.
